welcome.title: Welcome to the Crypto Underworld
welcome.subtitle: Build your deck, manipulate the markets, and avoid the regulators in this satirical take on Web3 culture and mafia tactics.
welcome.cardSystemDescription: Each card represents a crypto concept with satirical flavor and strategic value.
welcome.scoringSystemDescription: Earn $CW3 points to pass rounds and $CRYMP currency to buy new cards.
welcome.roundProgressionDescription: Progress through Small Blinds, Big Blinds, and challenging Boss rounds.
welcome.footer: CryptoMafia - Where diamond hands meet concrete shoes 💎🤝🏴‍☠️
